Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Airtable

Spreadsheet-database hybrid with rich field types and views.

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Appsmith

Open source Retool alternative for internal admin panels.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

ToolJet

Open source low-code builder for internal tools.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Budibase

Open source internal tool platform with built-in database.

License: GPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

NocoDB

Open source Airtable alternative — turn any DB into a spreadsheet UI.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Baserow

Self-hosted open source Airtable alternative with workspaces.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Teable

Postgres-backed Airtable alternative.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
